name: SCOBALL
NOTATION_PRICE_YEARLY
relations.query: SELECT notation, id, day, open, close, previous FROM ( SELECT np.notation AS notation, np.notation || '-' || EXTRACT(YEAR FROM np.day) AS id, np.DAY AS day, np."OPEN" AS open, np."CLOSE" AS close, np.previous AS previous, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY np.notation, EXTRACT(YEAR FROM np.day) ORDER BY np.day DESC) AS rn FROM scoball.notation_price np ) sub WHERE rn = 1
